import { projects } from '../data/siteData'; import './Work.css'; const statusColors = { live: '#34D399', building: '#FBBF24', concept: '#8A8A9E' }; const Work = () => (
Selected Work

Products we're
proud of.

0 ? ` delay-${i}` : ''}`} >
{project.initials}
{project.statusLabel}

{project.title}

{project.desc}

{project.tags.map((tag) => ( {tag} ))}
View Project
))}
); export default Work;
